message:
fix(clippy): resolve field_reassign_with_default in doom + quake

Convert test code from `let mut x = T::default(); x.field = val;`
to struct literal syntax with `..T::default()`. Also fix vel_x/vel_y
→ mom_x/mom_y field references in doom tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
